data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhances account security by requiring a second form of verification.
data.technical_spec: Support for OAuth, SMS, and Authenticator apps.

data.title: DDOS Protection Measures
data.description: Mitigates Distributed Denial of Service attacks to maintain service availability.
data.technical_spec: Employs techniques like rate limiting, traffic filtering, and global CDN edge servers.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data in transit using TLS to secure user information.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 deployed for secure HTTP connections.

data.title: Account Security Alerts
data.description: Notifies users of suspicious login attempts to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes machine learning to detect anomalies in user behavior.

data.title: Content Moderation Tools
data.description: Filters inappropriate content and enforces community guidelines.
data.technical_spec: Integrates AI-driven algorithms with human review processes.
